content.en: SQL injection attempt on admin page

content.ko: 약 99만 건 숙박 예약 정보 유출

content.en: Mass obscene texts sent using leaked data

en: Insufficient input validation in web application
Lack of access control on admin page

ko: 프라이버시 침해 발생 시 KISA 신고(118)
en: Block unknown texts and emails immediately
Isolate admin page on a separate network
Apply column-level encryption for sensitive booking data
Conduct regular vulnerability assessments (at least quarterly)
